_doc: Labelled diff fixtures for material-change F1 evaluation. Each entry is a synthetic unified diff and its expected classification.

vuln_auth_removed.label: auth-removed

vuln_priv_from_body.label: priv-from-body
vuln_priv_from_body.diff:
diff --git a/src/users.js b/src/users.js
--- a/src/users.js
+++ b/src/users.js
@@ -10,2 +10,3 @@
   name: req.body.name,
+  isAdmin: req.body.isAdmin,

vuln_new_shell_call.label: new-shell-call

vuln_prompt_injection.label: new-prompt-injection

vuln_cookie_secure_removed.label: cookie-flag-removed
vuln_cookie_secure_removed.diff:
diff --git a/src/session.js b/src/session.js
--- a/src/session.js
+++ b/src/session.js
@@ -7,1 +7,1 @@
-res.cookie('sid', token, { httpOnly: true, secure: true });

vuln_pipeline_floating_tag.label: pipeline-floating-tag
vuln_pipeline_floating_tag.diff:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -3,2 +3,2 @@
-      uses: foo/bar@a4f3c79e9be8b2347a8c8c0e16d9c7c8f2d1e2f3
+      uses: foo/bar@main

routine_comment_only.label: routine
routine_comment_only.diff:
diff --git a/src/foo.js b/src/foo.js
--- a/src/foo.js
+++ b/src/foo.js
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
+// This function does X
 function doX() {}

routine_format_change.label: routine

routine_rename_only.label: routine

routine_test_addition.label: routine
routine_test_addition.diff:
diff --git a/test/foo.test.js b/test/foo.test.js
--- a/test/foo.test.js
+++ b/test/foo.test.js
@@ -5,1 +5,2 @@
+test('it works', () => assert.ok(true));
